details: deleted duplicate end node 7 ('go vacationing in the Bahamas') because it was redundant after node 3 ('stay in the Bahamas'); removed node 7 and edge 3->7
deleted duplicate end node 5 ('buy a new jacket') because it was redundant after node 3 ('Pay for the jacket'); removed node 5 and edge 3->5
corrected double space in scenario 'make updates to  resume' to 'make updates to resume'
changed node 5 from 'make updates to  resume' to 'edit the resume document' to avoid duplication with scenario and better reflect its intermediate editing role
deleted duplicate end node 6 ('meet with instructor') and removed edge 4->6; updated script_graph to end at node 4
removed due to implicit loop/select logic (determine if eligible) not properly handled and duplicate end node; restructuring inconvenient
renamed node 5 from 'Call the doctor's office' to 'speak with the office staff' to avoid duplicate scenario node and logically complete the call.

introduced loop for password retry (added nodes 'see incorrect password message' and 'see desktop with icons'), renamed node 6 from 'launch a music playing app' to 'successfully open the music app' to avoid duplicate scenario node.

Introduced loop for letting in attendees: entry 'Listen for a knock' (1), retry 'Open the door' (0) and 'Let the attendees into the party' (6), exit changed to 'All attendees have arrived' (2, was 'Repeat until all the attendees have arrived'); removed old edge 6->2, added edges 6->1 and 1->2.

Introduced loop for walking to car: added node 'gauge distance to car' (9), changed node 1 from 'alternate feet until car is reached' to 'reach the car', restructured edges to form loop (entry 9, retry 5,6, exit 1); removed old edges 0->5, 0->6, 5->1, 6->1, added new edges 0->9, 9->5, 9->1, 5->6, 6->9.
introduced loop for receiving feedback, redrawing plan, and finalizing; modified duplicate end node 6 to 'finalize the plan'
introduced loop to represent daily school routine for a year; changed node 5 from 'Repeat for one year' to 'wake up in the morning' and set as loop entry
